mapper.select: SELECT `item_key` AS itemKey, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `t_skill_external_favorite` WHERE `item_key` IN #{k} GROUP BY `item_key`
SELECT `item_key` AS itemKey, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `t_skill_external_download_event` WHERE `item_key` IN #{k} GROUP BY `item_key`
SELECT `item_key` AS itemKey, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `t_skill_external_view_event` WHERE `item_key` IN #{k} GROUP BY `item_key`

SELECT `item_key` AS itemKey, COUNT(1) AS reviewCount, AVG(CASE WHEN `rating` IS NOT NULL AND `rating` BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN `rating` END) AS ratingAvg FROM `t_skill_external_review` WHERE `deleted` = 0 AND `item_key` IN #{k} GROUP BY `item_key`
